title: Recurring and Repeating Tasks
excerpt: Starting this topic over again because Monday seems to be ignoring all of the old topics. Many requesting easier methods to create repeating and recurring tasks have been ignored since 2020.

posts.author: DMarken (Danny)
posts.cookedHtml: Starting this topic over again because Monday seems to be ignoring all of the old topics. Many requesting easier methods to create repeating and recurring tasks have been ignored since 2020.

posts.author: DanIngham-IOI (Dan Ingham IOI / BPX)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @DMarken
Happy New Year
If I am understanding correctly, the easiest way to to create a reaccuting and repeating task would be with an automation
This would allow you to create the same task with the details filled in at your needed time period ie once a week, once a day etc. You can also specify which group it will get created in

Hope this provides the answer needed
Many thanks in advance
Dan



Screenshot 2023-01-03 at 09.45.421010×637 27.1 KB

posts.author: arubinomunoz (Amalia Rubino @Upscale (part of The Adaptavist Group))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone!

We’ve been inspired by all these comments about creating this feature and good news, we went and created the app! We’ve just launched Recurring Tasks, which now allows you to create recurring/repeating tasks in your monday.com boards. It is currently in Beta so please download it, give it a try and we would love to know what you think. I’ll also be more than happy to directly feed it back to our team! If you want to book a chat with me directly, here’s my calendly: Calendly - Amalia Rubino Muñoz

Thanks,
Amalia

posts.author: Henrivdm (Henri)
posts.cookedHtml: How do you set the Due Date to be the date of the new task creation (ie for a daily recurring task, the deadline should be for that day). I can only see a way to hard-code a date, which is silly for recurring tasks.

posts.author: Henrivdm (Henri)
posts.cookedHtml: I respect the efforts of 3d party app developers, but Task Recurrence is such a basic feature for an platform of this kind it should be Native.

posts.author: YashGarg (Yash Garg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @DMarken and @Henrivdm ,

We have created the app Recurring Tasks Schedule Pro - monday.com App Marketplace, which allows you to setup recurring tasks on item and subitem level in few simple clicks. It also has various advanced features like

  1. Highly customizable recurrence
  2. Ability to set status, due date, target group on schedule run
  3. Calendar view (to visualize your upcoming tasks on calendar)
  4. Weekday based schedules (2nd Thursday of month, etc)
  5. Custom date based name
  6. Notifications to task assignee

Screenshot 2024-08-12 at 3.16.42 PM1448×1686 252 KB
